finding_results.notes: Retuned the flagged post-clash dialogue spans so Tom, Len, and Arthur each carry distinct register signatures without relying on dialogue tags: Tom leans into shame-deflecting bus-depot matey talk, Len grounds conflict in pigeon-racing plainness, and Arthur redirects immediately to practical cleanup action. The sequence now shifts leverage from banter to class/status judgment and open confrontation rather than staying in joke-response cadence.

summary: Updated chapter_03 dialogue in the flagged sections to restore idiolect separation, preserve pressure-true colloquial texture, and enforce a clear leverage shift through the escalation and aftermath beats.
